text:
Simone Biles has admitted she had Botox done in the past, but "did not like it". TheOlympicgymnast got candid with her fans as she filmed herself doing her make-up ahead of the Individual All-Around competition at Paris 2024 on 1 August.

Simone, 27, shared the clip the day after the All-Around event took place in France, where the American athlete won gold. In her TikTok, Simone talked her fans through her glam routine and gave them a general update from theOlympicvillage. She revealed that for her 27th birthday she had "baby Botox" done, but it seems she won't be rushing to get any further treatments.

I have a funny story for you guys," she said. "So, for my 27th birthday, I got Botox, like, baby Botox, just right here in my T-zone, and I did not like it. So I haven't got it again, and mind you that was back in March."

Simone went on to explain how one of her eyebrows would lift on its own sometimes, with other gymnasts pointing it out during practice. She revealed that she sometimes couldn't get her eyebrow to go back down for nearly 20 seconds.

"It would randomly do that!" she recalled while showing her facial expressions. She said she can do "all the facial expressions" and began crinkling her forehead.The gymnast then declared of Botox: "Not doing that again!"

Simone also revealed that she is thinking of getting another tattoo to mark her time at Paris 2024. She said she is considering a new inking as an "ode to Paris", but admitted: "I'm not sure". Simone already has various tattoos, including the Olympic rings on her forearm.

The 2024 Olympic Games have been another huge success for Simone, who won her ninth Olympic medal at the All-Around event on 2 August. She made history as she became the third woman to become a two-time Olympic all-around champion.

Simone, who is the most decorated gymnast in history, also became the oldest woman to claim the biggest title in her sport since 1952. The medal marked her second gold won at Paris 2024 and sixth Olympic gold medal overall.

Speaking after her win, Simone said: "It is crazy that I am in the conversation of 'Greatest of all athletes' because I just still think, 'I'm Simone Biles from Spring, Texas who loves to flip.'"

Discovery+is the new home of the Olympics. The streamer is set to broadcast 3,800 hours of sport live from Paris.

Sports fans can getDiscovery+ for £3.99a month until the end of 2024 via Amazon Prime's video channels. This also comes with anAmazon Prime 30-day free trial.

title: Olympian Simone Biles admits to getting Botox at 27 with surprising revelation - OK! Magazine
author: Danni King
description: Olympic gymnast Simone Biles has opened up about getting Botox for her 27th birthday, admitting she 'did not like it' and won't be rushing to get it done again
